commands.name: create
manifest

options.name: --dependency
options.description: Dependency string for a required package

options.name: --description
options.description: Short description of the package

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: Directory used to resolve output file paths

options.name: --website
options.description:
URL of the package's homepage or source
repository

commands.description:
Generate a manifest.json file with the required 
package metadata
examples:
create manifest MyMod 2.0.0 --description "A great mod" 
--website https://thunderstore.io/

commands.description: Generate files required by Thunderstore packages

commands.name: fetch
version

options.name: --host
options.description: URL of the Thunderstore server

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

commands.description:
Print the latest published version number of a 
package
Retrieve information about packages from Thunderstore

commands.name: publish

options.name: --category
options.description: Category slug to label the package with

options.name: --has-nsfw
options.description: Mark the package as containing NSFW content

options.name: --host
options.description: URL of the Thunderstore server to publish to

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

options.name: --token
options.description: Service account API token for authentication

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Path to the '.zip' file to publish

arguments.name: team
arguments.description: Team that will own the published package

arguments.name: community
arguments.description: Slug of the community to publish the package to

commands.description: Upload a zipped package to Thunderstore.

commands.name: validate
categories

options.name: --host
options.description:
URL of the Thunderstore server to validate
against

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

arguments.name: community
arguments.description:
Slug of the community to validate categories 
against

arguments.name: categories
arguments.description: Slugs of the categories to validate

commands.description:
Check that all category slugs exist within a given 
community

commands.name: community

options.name: --host
options.description:
URL of the Thunderstore server to validate
against

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

arguments.name: community
arguments.description: Slug of the community to validate

commands.description:
Check that a community slug corresponds to an existing
community on Thunderstore

commands.name: dependencies

options.name: --host
options.description:
URL of the Thunderstore server to validate
against

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

commands.description:
Check that all dependency strings resolve to existing 
packages on Thunderstore

commands.name: package

options.name: --host
options.description:
URL of the Thunderstore server to validate
against

options.name: --icon-path
options.description: Relative path to the package icon

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Minimum level of messages to display

options.name: --manifest-path
options.description: Relative path to the manifest file

options.name: --readme-path
options.description: Relative path to the README file

options.name: --token
options.description: Service account API token for authentication

arguments.name: package-folder
arguments.description: Path to the folder containing the package files

arguments.name: team
arguments.description: Team that will publish the package

commands.description:
Check that a package and its metadata are valid before
publishing

Check that values and package files meet 
Thunderstore's requirements
